meaning: n.客轮的上层甲板,建筑物或游泳池等的日光浴处所
examples: Access to exclusive private courtyard area with pool, hot tub and sundeck.
Breakfast and lunch are served on the Sundeck Terrace overlooking the reserve.
Is it a sundeck for a pool, or will it be used to entertain guests at a barbeque?
Regardless of the time of year, sun worshippers congregate on the Diller-von Furstenberg Sundeck.
The stories mention key corporate partnerships, confirming rumors you'd heard buzzing around the lunch table at Sundeck.
